name: pseudo 🇺🇦
fullText:
got the vision pro finally

as someone who lives out of a backpack, can't believe i was missing out for so long

don't really recommend it otherwise (unless you really like movies)

name: Monad 华语社群
fullText:
本周在Monad生态系统中

- @Balancer V3现已在Monad上线。快速执行遇上高效流动性。

- @brale_xyz现已在Monad上线。构建者可以使用支持20多条其他链的相同Brale API发行和管理受监管的稳定币。

- cbBTC在Monad上线，由@chainlink CCIP提供支持。Coinbase的包装比特币现在可以在Monad https://t.co/Rqf1ebL7ZP
